Features</b></font><font style="font-size: 14px;"><br><br></font><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 14px;">• First snapshot is full</font><br><font style="font-size: 14px;">• Later snapshots are incremental</font><br><font style="font-size: 14px;">• Stored in Cloud Storage</font><br><font style="font-size: 14px;">• Region independent</font><br><font style="font-size: 14px;">• Supports disaster recovery</font><br><font style="font-size: 14px;">• Can create new disks</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="250" x="533" y="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell style="font-size: 14px;">✓ Disaster Recovery</font></b><br><b><font style="font-size: 14px;">✓ Restore Operations</font></b><br><b><font style="font-size: 14px;">✓ Backup Automation</font></b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="167" width="205" x="555.5" y="343" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
